relationships: ber:Ad tessiweḍ Dzayer ad tuɣal d tamurt ideg tella tsinutlayt tameɣradant﹖
ber:Mennad iger tamawt dakken tella la as-tɣelli tbatrit i usawal-nnes
ber:Mary tenna-d dakken seg zik ay tella d taddalant
ber:Taqcict-nni, meskint, tella akken kan ay teqfel mraw tam n yiseggasen
ber:Sami iɣil dakken Layla deg umahil ay tella
ber:Sɣiwes tameddurt-nnek ɣef leḥsab n wakken tella tegnit
ber:Ur cikkeɣ akk dakken yella wasmi ay tella Tenṭaltit
ber:Sɣiwes tameddurt-nnem ɣef leḥsab n wakken tella tegnit
ber:Sami iɣil dakken Layla tella deg umahil
ber:Tom iger tamawt dakken Mary tella tesεa amrig
ber:Lorenzo iger tamawt dakken tawwurt n ugaṛaj-nnes tella terẓem
ber:Dzayer Tamaneɣt d tamdint ideg tella tsurfa tanmettit
ber:Rima tella tetteddu ad tfak tizrawin-is deg uɣerbaz alemmas
ber:Tamurt n Yizwawen tella d tahuskayt imir-nni
ber:Imir-a, Lezzayer d tamurt aydeg tella tɣellsit
ber:Yanni yenna-d dakken Skura mačči din i tella
ber:Matta tella tɣawsa yellan ɣer-s tiṭṭawin u nettat ur tetthenna c﹖
ber:Matta tella tɣawsa i yellan ur tettenjamed c ad tt-tsawid﹖
ber:Zik, Dzayer tella d tamurt yeddren ladɣa s tkerrazt
ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt d tamdint aydeg tella tɣellist
ber:Layla tella d tamsaltut ilan aṭas n termit
ber:Tameddurt n Sami tella deg umihi
ber:Yemma-s n Gunter tella tetteddu ad d-teqqel ɣer taddart zik
ber:Taqcict-nni, meskint, tella akken kan ay teqfel 18 n yiseggasen
ber:Layla tella d tamsaltut yesɛan aṭas n termit
ber:Sami tella terra-t tmara ad yexdem ayenni
ber:Tamsulta tella tesεa ssebba ay tt-yeǧǧan ad tcikk deg Sami
ber:Dmitri tella terra-t tmara ad yeg ayen i as-d-tecreḍ Rima
ber:Lorenzo yuɣal yeẓra dakken tawwurt-nni tella tefteḥ
ber:Zzayer tettwaslelli akken ma tella deg wagim tẓat n tmaḍ sḍimraw sin
ber:Yemma-s n Gunter tella tetteddu ad d-teqqel ɣer uxxam zik
ber:Tawwurt-nni tella tefteḥ yernu aya d aɣwali
